name: Boysmate
overview: After starting a new job, Ian is in urgent need of short-term housing. His best friend, Minwoo, suggests he move in with his junior, Jaden. What seems like a convenient solution quickly gets complicated - Jaden’s longtime high school crush suddenly becomes his roommate.

trailers.title: [SUB] BL K-drama [ Boys mate ] 보이즈메이트 Teaser
